experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.nate_desc: Development and maintenance of the company's proprietary ERP system. Working on both front-end and back-end sides. Implementing improvements and resolving issues to optimize internal processes.
experience.urbaser_desc: CRM development and maintenance using Javascript and MySql. Database maintenance. Route virtualization in GIS software such as Qgis and ArcGis. Troubleshooting. Implementation and testing of new technologies.
